rationale: Educ. Code §37.141 defines 'child' and 'school offense' for school disciplinary proceedings. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: "School offense" means an offense committed by a child enrolled in a public school that is a Class C misdemeanor other than a traffic offense and that is committed on property under the control and jurisdiction of a school district.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this statute's subject matter.
